## Checklist

- [ ] New or changed scripts ship a `--self-test`, and it's wired into `npm test`
- [ ] **No personal data** and nothing from `data/` is committed
- [ ] Docs and `CHANGELOG.md` updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] Follows [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and the project guardrails
      (local-first, human-in-the-loop, never fabricate)
- [ ] LaTeX templates untouched in their preamble (filled `<<PLACEHOLDERS>>` only)
